methodology: OWASP Top 10 + STRIDE + Attack Surface Mapping
positive_security_controls: Parameterized SQL queries throughout (zero raw SQL injection vectors)
CORS restricted to configured origins with allowlist (demo-app) and localhost (guardian)
CSRF double-submit pattern with __Host- prefix and timingSafeEqual
JWT auth with env-var-based secret (throws on missing JWT_SECRET)
Webhook HMAC-SHA256 signature verification with timingSafeEqual
Security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, HSTS, no X-Powered-By)
Input validation via Zod schemas on auth and task creation endpoints
Ownership checks on all task CRUD operations (user_id scoping)
Global error handler suppresses stack traces (error ID only)
SSRF protection on DAST scanner URL endpoint
MCP server path validation blocking system directories
Rate limiting on guardian dashboard API
Scrypt password hashing with random 32-byte salt
Soft delete for users (preserves referential integrity)
Request body size limits (1MB demo-app, 100KB guardian)
Evidence chain with SHA-256 integrity verification

candidates_filtered.filter_reason: Independent verification scored 4/10. Scrypt KDF dominates timing (~100-200ms), string comparison delta is nanoseconds. No published remote timing attacks against post-KDF comparisons.
candidates_filtered.recommendation: Best practice: switch to crypto.timingSafeEqual for defense-in-depth

candidates_filtered.filter_reason: Data integrity issue, not security. All values pass through parameterized queries. No injection or XSS vector (JSON API).
Localhost-only bind + CORS restricted to localhost:port. No DNS rebinding vector (CORS checks Origin header). Standard trust model for local dev tools.

candidates_filtered.candidate: Guardian config stores API keys in plaintext YAML
candidates_filtered.filter_reason: Hard exclusion: secrets on disk in user home directory, OS-permissioned. Standard pattern for CLI config.
Hard exclusion: shell injection needs untrusted input. Entry comes from readdirSync (filesystem, not user input).
Scrypt computation dwarfs timing delta. Same error message for both paths. Below confidence threshold (7/10).

candidates_filtered.candidate: Guardian DAST SSRF bypass via DNS rebinding
candidates_filtered.filter_reason: Requires local dashboard access (localhost-only). CORS blocks cross-origin. Highly theoretical. 5/10.
Dev-only file with explicit guard against non-local databases. Comment says 'not-for-production'. Intentional dev tooling.
